prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock price volatility for large-cap retail stocks like Target (TGT), I estimated a 3-day standard deviation of approximately 1.13% of the current price. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal distribution of returns, with wider intervals reflecting increased uncertainty over the 3-day horizon.
